mapper.select: SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment (user_id, doctor_id, appointment_date, description, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{doctorId}, #{appointmentDate}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE appointment SET user_id = #{userId}, doctor_id = #{doctorId}, appointment_date = #{appointmentDate}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM appointment ORDER BY create_time DESC
